# `api.jobs.add_item_notes`

> `POST /job/{jobDisplayId}/item/notes` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.jobs.add_item_notes(job_display_id: int, *, data: ItemNotesRequest | dict) -> ServiceBaseResponse
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab jobs add_item_notes <job_display_id> [--data ...]
```

POST /job/{jobDisplayId}/item/notes.

Args:
    job_display_id: Job display ID.
    data: Item notes payload. Accepts an :class:`ItemNotesRequest`
        instance or a dict.

Request model: :class:`ItemNotesRequest`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `notes` | `str` | yes | Item notes content |
